from sympy import Symbol, Matrix, pretty
from sympy.printing.conventions import split_super_sub
from sympy.printing.pretty.pretty_symbology import pretty_symbol
for s in ['w0', 'omega0', 'ω0', 'w𝟙', 'ω𝟙', 'alpha0', 'α0']:
    print(repr(s), split_super_sub(s), repr(pretty_symbol(s)), repr(pretty(Symbol(s), use_unicode=True)))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import re, unicodedata
patterns = [r'"'^([''^'"\\W\\d_]+)(\\d+)"'$'"', r'"'^('"\\D+?)(\\d+)"'$'"', r'"'^(.+?)('"\\d+)"'$'"']
for p in patterns:
    print(p)
    q = re.compile(p)
    for s in ['w0','omega0','ω0','w𝟙','ω𝟙','x²','a.1','_1','é2','x１']:
        m=q.match(s); print(' ', s, m.groups() if m else None)
for c in ['0','𝟙','１','²']:
    print(c, unicodedata.category(c), bool(re.match(r'\\d', c)), c.isdigit(), c.isdecimal(), c.isnumeric())
PY
rg -n \"_name_with_digits_p|split_super_sub\\(\" sympy | head -120"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import re
from sympy import Matrix, symbols, pretty
import sympy.printing.conventions as conventions
from sympy.printing.conventions import split_super_sub

# The reported case with a literal Unicode omega in the Symbol name.
t0, t1, t2, w0 = symbols('t0 t1 t2 ω0')
print('BEFORE')
print(pretty(Matrix([[-t0*w0, -t1*w0, -t2*w0]]), use_unicode=True))

# Exercise the exact upstream-style pattern without changing the worktree.
conventions._name_with_digits_p = re.compile(r'"'^([''^'"\\W\\d_]+)(\\d+)"'$'"', re.UNICODE)
print('SPLIT AFTER PATTERN')
for s in ['w𝟙', 'w𝟙2𝟙', 'ω0', 'ω𝟙2"'^3α'"']:
    print(s, split_super_sub(s))
print('AFTER')
print(pretty(Matrix([[-t0*w0, -t1*w0, -t2*w0]]), use_unicode=True))
PY"

from sympy import Matrix, symbols, pretty
import sympy.printing.conventions as conventions
from sympy.printing.conventions import split_super_sub

# The reported case with a literal Unicode omega in the Symbol name.
t0, t1, t2, w0 = symbols('t0 t1 t2 ω0')
print('BEFORE')
print(pretty(Matrix([[-t0*w0, -t1*w0, -t2*w0]]), use_unicode=True))

# Exercise the exact upstream-style pattern without changing the worktree.
conventions._name_with_digits_p = re.compile(r'"'^([''^'"\\W\\d_]+)(\\d+)"'$'"', re.UNICODE)
print('SPLIT AFTER PATTERN')
for s in ['w𝟙', 'w𝟙2𝟙', 'ω0', 'ω𝟙2"'^3α'"']:
    print(s, split_super_sub(s))
print('AFTER')
print(pretty(Matrix([[-t0*w0, -t1*w0, -t2*w0]]), use_unicode=True))
PY"
